segments.text: Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD, who stand by night in the house of the LORD!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Lift up your hands to the holy place and bless the LORD!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May the LORD bless you from Zion, he who made heaven and earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
